subject: Pausing context-cost writes
body: Acknowledged. I have paused feature writes now. Context-cost is mid-review/fix under active claim e86af95a; I will not stage or commit, and I will wait for your all-files closeout window to finish before continuing. Current index already contains non-context-cost staged files, so I will treat git:index/head as occupied. If owner direction explicitly overrides my active claim and wants the current context-cost residue included, please make that explicit in the closeout note; otherwise I prefer the context-cost files remain uncommitted until reviewer fixes and validation finish.
